title: Study GOV.UK — extract a portable design.md
prompt: Extract the design DNA of GOV.UK as a public design reference (the OGL-licensed GOV.UK Design System) — its macrostructure, type-pairing roles, colour anchor, and component archetypes — and lock it into a portable design.md. Structure only, never pixels or copy.

vars.brief: Extract the design DNA of GOV.UK as a public design reference (the OGL-licensed GOV.UK Design System) — its macrostructure, type-pairing roles, colour anchor, and component archetypes — and lock it into a portable design.md. Structure only, never pixels or copy.

source.license: OGL v3.0 (public reference — DNA extraction only, no pixels/copy)
source.note: URL-mode study of a public, OGL-licensed design system.
